claims.text: Convolution is the fundamental building block of modern convolutional neural networks
claims.source_quote: The convolution operator is the fundamental building block of modern convolutional neural networks (CNNs)

claims.text: Convolution is a fixed, linear, locally-averaging operator
claims.source_quote: its structure as a fixed, linear, locally-averaging operator limits its ability to capture structured signal properties

claims.text: Convolution has limitations in capturing complex signal properties like low-rank decompositions, adaptive basis representations, and non-uniform spatial dependencies
claims.source_quote: its structure as a fixed, linear, locally-averaging operator limits its ability to capture structured signal properties such as low-rank decompositions, adaptive basis representations, and non-uniform spatial dependencies

claims.text: There are five families of alternative operators to convolution in image processing
claims.source_quote: We organise the landscape of alternative operators into five families

claims.text: The five families of alternative operators are: decomposition-based, adaptive weighted, basis-adaptive, integral and kernel, and attention-based operators
claims.source_quote: (i) decomposition-based operators, (ii) adaptive weighted operators, (iii) basis-adaptive operators, (iv) integral and kernel operators, and (v) attention-based operators
